title: Sriwijaya Bow
description: The Resource Pack changes the appearance of your bow with an Indonesian theme from the Sriwijaya era
body:
**Indonesia**

!PERHATAN!

## 
**Tentang Resourcepack Ini**

Kalian bisa download resourcepack yang ku bagikan secara gratis!

Jika kalian ingin memakai resourcepack ini kalian harus memakai **Optifine/Cit Resewn**

Kalian juga harus mengubah nama agar itemnya bisa berubah dengan model yang ku bagikan


```
Rename : Sriwijaya Bow
  Item : Bow
```
## 
**Tentang Licensi**
Licensi penuh hanya ini milik kami

Jika kalian membeli model kepada kami, maka licensi akan berada di kalian

Kalian dilarang keras untuk menjual model yang kubagiin secara gratis!

Jika kalian melanggar peraturan yang kami berikan, maka kami akan menindak lanjuti kalian!

**Pemilik : FabiyanSyah09**

**Youtube : FabiyanSyah09**

## 

**English**

!WARNING!

## 
**About This Resourcepack**

You can download the resource pack that I share for free!

If you want to use this resourcepack you have to use **Optifine/Cit Resewn**

You also have to change the name so that the item can change to the model I shared


```
Change Name: Bow Sriwijaya
  Item: Bow
```
## 
**About License**
This full license belongs to us only

If you buy a model from us, the license will be with you

You are strictly prohibited from selling the models I share for free!

If you violate the rules we provide, then we will take further action against you!

**Owner: FabiyanSyah09**

**Youtube: FabiyanSyah09**
